publicationStmt.authority: HANSEL: Human-Accessible NLP-ready Sanskrit E-text Library

p.ref: Distributed by HANSEL under a Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License.

licence.p:
Under this licence, you are free to:
Share — copy and redistribute the material in any medium or format.
Adapt — remix, transform, and build upon the material.

list.item: Attribution — You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate if changes were made. You may do so in any reasonable manner, but not in any way that suggests the licensor endorses you or your use.
NonCommercial — You may not use the material for commercial purposes.
ShareAlike — If you remix, transform, or build upon the material, you must distribute your contributions under the same license as the original.
No additional restrictions — You may not apply legal terms or technological measures that legally restrict others from doing anything the license permits.

licence.p: See the Creative Commons site for full details.
HANSEL assumes no responsibility for unauthorised use that infringes rights.

editorialDecl.p: I (T. Neill) produced this HANSEL edition. I first manually converted R. Steiner's and M. Straube's submitted plain-text file by adding basic structural markup (tabbed verses, stage directions, Prakrit). I then did the same for Christian Ferstl's separately submitted manual transcript, which contained inter-word spacing (and also hyphenation for compounds, which I removed), Sanskrit chāyās (supplied/adapted from Achan 1925), and a few corrections of typos. Next, I re-OCRed the PDF to recover line-break information, then merged this information into the structured transcript. Finally, I added structural markup for HANSEL and gave the Sanskrit portion of the main text a full proofread, during which I checked word separation. The Prakrit and Sanskrit chāyā material still need to be proofread. For technical reasons, in cases where a line started with a combination stage direction and speaker identification, I have inverted the order to place the latter first and the former second (e.g. “praviśya vidūṣakaḥ |” becomes “vidūṣakaḥ — ((praviśya))”.) This can be considered a bug which I should fix later. Similarly, I have rendered the "nepathye" stage direction as speaker identification

The source edition is printed in Devanāgarī; the electronic text uses lossless IAST transliteration. IAST differs slightly from ISO 15919; conversion can be achieved via:
ṛ → r̥
ḷ → l̥
ḻ → ḷ
ṃ → ṁ
e → ē
o → ō

Corrections and uncertainties:
Replacement: before after
Deletion:
Addition:
Unclear:

revisionDesc.change: Manually prepared transcript of edition, modified punctuation, added some (not all) inter-word spacing, added Sanskrit chāyās from Achan 1925.
Submitted plaintext file of edition with identical text to that printed in 2006.

lg.l: tvāṃ pātu lakṣaṇāḍhyaḥ suravaramukuṭendracārumaṇighṛṣṭaḥ |
rāvaṇanamitāṅguṣṭho rudrasya sadārcitaḥ pādaḥ || 1 ||

div.p: idam asmadīyaṃ gṛham | yāvat praviśāmi | praviśya | vidūṣaka vidūṣaka |

p.seg: ayya | aa mhi |ārya | ayam asmi |

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p: vijanaṃ tāvat | yāvat te priyam ākhyāsyāmi |

p.seg:
ayya | taha | niṣkramya praviśya | idaṃ viaṇaṃ | piaṃ dāva ayyo
ācakkhadu |ārya | tathā | idaṃ vijanam | priyaṃ tāvad ārya ācaṣṭām |

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p:
śrūyatām | adyāsmi bahir nagarād āgacchatānekasiddhādeśajanita
pratyayena lakṣaṇinā brāhmaṇenāham ādiṣṭaḥ | adya saptame 'hani tava rājakule
prekṣā bhaviṣyati | tatas tvatprayogaparituṣṭena rājñā dattāṃ mahatīṃ śriyam a
vāpsyasīti | tasya brāhmaṇasyāmithyādeśitayā janitotsāhaḥ saṅgītakaṃ
kariṣyāmi |

p.seg: kadamaṃ dāṇi ayyeṇa ṇāḍaaṃ ṇāḍīadi |katamad idānīm āryeṇa nāṭakaṃ nāṭyate |

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p:
atraiva me cintā | atha tu nāṭakaprakaraṇodbhavāsu vārehāmṛga
ḍimasamavakāravyāyogabhāṇasallāpavīthyutsṛṣṭikāṅkaprahasanādiṣu daśajātiṣu
nāṭyaraseṣu hāsyam eva pradhānam iti paśyāmi | tasmāt prahasanam eva prayo
kṣyāmi |

p.seg: ayya | ahaṃ hasso vi pahasaṇaṃ ṇa āṇe |ārya | ahaṃ hāsyo 'pi prahasanaṃ na jāne |

sp.speaker: sūtradhāraḥ
sp.p: tena tu śikṣatu bhavān | na śakyam aśikṣitena kiñcid api jñātum |

p.seg: teṇa hi ayyo evva me uvadisadu |tena hy ārya eva me upadiśatu |

lg.head: bāḍham |
lg.l: jñānārthaṃ kṛtabuddhiḥ sanmārgeṇānugaccha gacchantam |
yogeśvaraṃ dvijavṛṣaṃ śiṣya ivemaṃ parivrājam || 2 ||

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
śāṇḍilya śāṇḍilya | pṛṣṭhato vilokya | na tāvad dṛśyate |
sadṛśam asya tamovṛtasya | kutaḥ |

lg.l:
deho roganidhir jarāvaśagato līnāntakādhiṣṭhito
yo nityapratighātaruddhaviṣayas tīre yathā pādapaḥ |

taṃ labdhvā sukṛtair anekaguṇitair dehātmanā vismito
matto yo balarūpayauvanaguṇair doṣān na tān paśyati || 3 ||

sp.p:
tasmād anaparāddhaḥ khalv ayaṃ tapasvī | punar api samāhvānaṃ kariṣye | śāṇḍilya
śāṇḍilya |

p.seg:
bho | puṭhamaṃ evva ahaṃ karaḍuasesasamiddhe ṇirakkharappakkhitta
jīhe kaṇṭhappasattajaṇṇovavīde bamhaṇṇamattaparituṭṭhe kule pasūdo | tado
dudīaṃ amhāṇaṃ gehe asaṇaṇāseṇa bubhukkhido pādarasaṇaloheṇa sakkia
samaṇaaṃ pavvajido mhi | tado tahiṃ dāsīe vuttāṇaṃ ekkakālabhattattaṇeṇa
bubhukkhido taṃ pi visajjia cīvaraṃ chindia pattaṃ patolia chattamattaṃ
gaṇhia ṇiggado mhi | tado tidīaṃ imassa duṭṭhācayyassa bhaṇḍabhāragaddabho
saṃvutto | tā adūragadaṃ bhaavantaṃ sambhāvemi | kahiṃ ṇu khu gado bhaavo |
ā | eso duṭṭhaliṅgī pādarasaṇaloheṇa eāī bhikkhaṃ āhiṇḍiduṃ puvvaṃ
gado tti takkemi | parikramya dṛṣṭvā | eso khu bhaavo | upagamya | marisedu
marisedu bhaavo |bhoḥ | prathamam evāhaṃ karaṭakaśeṣasamṛddhe nirakṣaraprakṣiptajihve kaṇṭhaprasaktayajñopavīte brāhmaṇyamātraparituṣṭe kule prasūtaḥ | tato dvitīyam asmākaṃ gehe 'śananāśena bubhukṣitaḥ prātaraśanalobhena śākyaśramaṇakaṃ pravrajito 'smi | tatas tasmin dāsyāḥ putrāṇāṃ ekakālabhaktatvena bubhukṣitas tam api visṛjya cīvaraṃ chittvā pātraṃ pratolya chatramātraṃ gṛhītvā nirgato 'smi | tatas tṛtīyam asya duṣṭācāryasya bhāṇḍabhāragardabhaḥ saṃvṛttaḥ | tad adūragataṃ bhagavantaṃ saṃbhāvayāmi | kutra nu khalu gato bhagavān | ā | eṣa duṣṭaliṅgī prātaraśanalobhenaikākī bhikṣām āhiṇḍituṃ pūrvaṃ gata iti tarkayāmi | eṣa khalu bhagavān | mṛṣyatāṃ mṛṣyatāṃ bhagavān |

bho bhaavaṃ | imassiṃ jīvaloe ṇiccocchavavisese suhappahāṇe
keṇa vihiṇā bhikkhaṃ āhiṇḍadi bhaavo |bhoḥ bhagavan | asmiñ jīvaloke nityotsavaviśeṣe sukhapradhāne kena vidhinā bhikṣām āhiṇḍate bhagavān |

lg.head: śṛṇu |
lg.l:
amānakāmaḥ sahitavyadharṣaṇaḥ
kṛśāj janād bhaikṣakṛtātmadhāraṇaḥ |

carāmi doṣavyasanottaraṃ jagad
dhradaṃ bahugrāham ivāpramādavān || 4 ||

p.seg: bho bhaavaṃ |bhoḥ bhagavan |

lg.l:
ṇa māmao atthi ṇa bhāduo vā
pidā kudo me bhaavappasādo |

ekko ahaṃ aṇṇahadattaṇeṇa
jaṭṭhiṃ paviṭṭho ṇa khu dhammalohā || 5 ||
na māmako 'sti na bhṛātṛko vā
pitā kuto me bhagavatprasādaḥ |
eko 'ham annahatatvena
yaṣṭiṃ praviṣṭo na khalu dharmalobhāt || 5 ||

p.seg: ṇaṃ bhūdattho aliaṃ bandhaaṃ ti bhaavo bhaṇādi |nanu bhūtārtho 'līkaṃ bandhakam iti bhagavān bhaṇati |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p: atha kim | satyam anṛtaṃ cābhisandhāya kṛtaṃ bandhakaṃ bhavati |

lg.l:
yadā tu saṅkalpitam iṣṭam iṣṭataḥ
karoti karmāvahitendriyaḥ pumān |

tadāsya tatkarmaphalaṃ sadā suraiḥ
surakṣito nyāsa ivānupālyate || 6 ||

p.seg: kadā ṇu khu tassa phalaṃ lahadi |kadā nu khalu tasya phalaṃ labhate |
taṃ puṇa kahaṃ lahadi |tat punaḥ kathaṃ labhate |
kiṃ puṇa edaṃ asaṅgada tti pucchadi |kiṃ punar etad asaṃgateti pṛcchati |

lg.l:
sukheṣu duḥkheṣu ca nityatulyatāṃ
bhayeṣu harṣeṣu ca nātiriktatām |

suhṛtsv amitreṣu ca bhāvatulyatāṃ
vadanti tāṃ tattvavido hy asaṅgatām || 7 ||

p.seg: edaṃ puṇa atthi |etat punar asti |
kiṃ sakkaṃ kattuṃ ti bhaavo bhaṇādi |kiṃ śakyaṃ kartum iti bhagavān bhaṇati |
aliaṃ aliaṃ edaṃ |alīkam alīkam etat |
bhaavo khu dāva kissa maṃ kuppadi |bhagavān khalu tāvat kasmān me kupyati |
jai ahaṃ ahīāmi vā ṇāhīāmi vā kiṃ tava muttassa |yady aham adhīye vā nādhīye vā kiṃ tava muktasya |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
mā maivam | abhyupagataśiṣyārthaṃ tāḍanaṃ smṛtam iti | tasmād a
kupitaś cāhaṃ śreyo'rthaṃ bhavantaṃ tāḍayāmi |

p.seg:
accheraṃ accheraṃ | akuvido ṇāma maṃ tāḍedi | chindīadu esā
kahā | adikkamadi bhikkhavelā |āścaryam āścaryam | akupito nāma māṃ tāḍayati | chidyatām eṣā kathā | atikrāmati bhikṣāvelā |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
mūrkha | prātas tāvan na madhyāhnaḥ | nyastamusale vyaṅgāre sarvabhukta
jane kāla ity upadeśaḥ | tasmād viśramārtham idam udyānaṃ praviśāvaḥ |

p.seg: hā hā | paḍiññāhāṇio kila bhaavo |hā hā | pratijñāhānikaḥ kila bhagavān |
ṇaṃ samasukhadukkho kila bhaavo |nanu samasukhaduḥkhaḥ kila bhagavān |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
atha kim | samasukhaduḥkho mamātmā | karmātmā viśrama
m icchati |

p.seg: bho bhaavaṃ | ko eso attā ṇāma | ko aṇṇo kammattā ṇāma |bho bhagavan | ka eṣa ātmā nāma | ko 'nyaḥ karmātmā nāma |

lg.head: śṛṇu |
lg.l:
yaḥ svapne gaganam upaiti so 'ntarātmā
so 'py ātmā vidhivihitaṃ prayāti yaś ca |

deho 'yaṃ nara iti sañjñito 'nyathā vā
karmātmā śramasukhabhājanaṃ narāṇām || 8 ||

p.seg:
jo ajaro amaro acchejjo abhejjo so attā ṇāma | jo hasadi
hāsedi saadi bhuñjadi vilaaṃ ca gacchadi so kammattā ṇāma |yo 'jaro 'maro 'cchedyo 'bhedyaḥ sa ātmā nāma | yo hasati hāsayati śete bhuṅkte vilayaṃ ca gacchati sa karmātmā nāma |
ā | avehi | abhiggahido si |ā | apehi/avehi | abhigṛhīto 'si |
ṇaṃ so evva dāṇi eso | ṇahi sarīraṃ viṇā atthi kimpi |nanu sa evedānīm eṣaḥ | na hi śarīraṃ vināsti kim api |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
laukikam abhihitam | yataś ca bhedam upagatānāṃ sattvānāṃ sthānāni
śrūyante | ata evaṃ brūmaḥ |

p.seg: savvaṃ dāva ciṭṭhadu | tuvaṃ dāva ko |sarvaṃ tāvat tiṣṭhatu | tvaṃ tāvat kaḥ |

lg.head: śṛṇu |
lg.l:
khapavanasalilānāṃ tejasaś caikadeśād
upacitacalamūrtiḥ pārthivadravyarāśiḥ |

śravaṇanayanajihvānāsikāsparśavedī
nara iti kṛtasañjñaḥ ko 'py ahaṃ prāṇidharmā || 9 ||

p.seg:
hā hā | ettiamatteṇa attāṇaṃ pi ṇa āṇādi | kiṃ puṇa
attāṇaṃ | bho bhaavaṃ | idaṃ uyyāṇaṃ |hā hā | etāvanmātreṇa ātmānam api na jānāti | kiṃ punar ātmānam | bho bhagavan | idam udyānam |
bhaavaṃ evva purado pavisadu | ahaṃ piṭṭhado pavisāmi |bhagavān eva purataḥ praviśatu | ahaṃ pṛṣṭhataḥ praviśāmi |

† polāaṇīe † mama mādāe sudaṃ asoapallavantalaṇiluddho
vaggho paḍivasadi tti | tā bhaavaṃ evva purado pavisadu | ahaṃ piṭṭhado
pavisāmi |paurāṇikyā mama mātuḥ śrutam aśokapallavāntaraniruddho vyāghraḥ prativasatīti | tad bhagavān eva purataḥ praviśatu | ahaṃ pṛṣṭhataḥ praviśāmi |

avihā | vaggheṇa gahido mhi | moedha maṃ vagghamuhādo |
aṇāho via vaggheṇa khāido mhi | idaṃ khu luhilaṃ passavadi kaṇṭhādo |avidhā | vyāghreṇa gṛhīto 'smi | mocayatha māṃ vyāghramukhāt | anātha iva vyāghreṇa khādito 'smi | idaṃ khalu rudhiraṃ prasravati kaṇṭhāt |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p: śāṇḍilya | na bhetavyaṃ na bhetavyam | mayūraḥ khalv eṣaḥ |

p.seg: saccaṃ moro |satyaṃ mayūraḥ |
jai moro ugghāḍemi akkhiṇī |yadi mayūra udghāṭayāmy akṣiṇī |

avihā | dāsīe vutto vaggho mabbhaeṇa morarūvaṃ gaṇhia palā
adi | udyānaṃ virūpya | hī hī | campaaajjuṇakadambaṇīvaṇiulatila
akaṇṇiārakuravaakappūracūdapiaṅgusālatālatamālapuṇṇāaṇāabaulasa
ralasajjasinduvāratiṇasullasattavaṇṇakaṇavīrakuḍaavaṇhicandaṇāsoamalli
āṇandivattataarakhadirakadalīsamavaiṇṇaṃ vasantovasohidappavālapattapa
llavakusumamañjarīsamāulaṃ adimuttamāhavīladāmaṇḍavamaṇḍidaṃ morakoila
mattabbhamaramahurārāvasaṅghuṭṭaṃ piajaṇavippaoasamuppaṇṇasoābhibhūdajuva
dījaṇāṇudāvaaraṃ sampauttāṇaṃ suhāvahaṃ aho ramaṇijjaṃ khu idaṃ uyyāṇaṃ |avidhā | dāsyāḥ putro vyāghro madbhayena mayūrarūpaṃ gṛhītvā palāyate | hi hi | campakārjunakadambanīpaniculatilakakarṇikārakuravakakarpūracūtapriyaṅgusāla tālatamālapuṃnāganāgabakulasaralasarjasinduvāratṛṇaśūlyasaptaparṇakaravīrakuṭajavarṇicandanāśokamallikānandyāvartatagarakhadirakadalīsamavakīrṇaṃ vasantopaśobhitapravālapatrapallavakusumamañjarīsamākulam atimuktamādhavīlatāmaṇḍapamaṇḍitaṃ mayūrakokilamattabhramaramadhurārāvasaṃghuṣṭaṃ priyajanaviprayogasamutpannaśokābhibhūtayuvatijanānutāpakaraṃ saṃprayuktānāṃ sukhāvaham aho ramaṇīyaṃ khalv idam udyānam |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
mūrkha | ahany ahani hīyamāneṣv indriyeṣu kiṃ te ramaṇīyam |
kutaḥ |

lg.l:
abhyāgataḥ kisalayābharaṇo vasantaḥ
prāptā śarat kumudaṣaṇḍavibhūṣaṇeti |

bālo naveṣv ṛtuṣu rajyati nāma loke
yaj jīvitaṃ harati tat kila ramyam asya || 10 ||

p.seg: jaṃ jadā ramaṇijjaṃ taṃ tadā ramaṇijjaṃ ti pucchadi |yad yadā ramaṇīyaṃ tat tadā ramaṇīyam iti pṛcchati |

lg.l: anāgataṃ prārthayatām atikrāntaṃ ca śocatām |
vartamānair atuṣṭānāṃ nirvāṇaṃ nopapadyate || 11 ||

p.seg: āadamāṇo panthā | kahiṃ dāṇi uvavisāmo |āyatamānaḥ panthāḥ | kutredānīm upaviśāvaḥ |
acokkhaṃ acokkhaṃ |acaukṣam acaukṣam |

jadā parissanto uvavisadukāmo tadā acokkhaṃ cokkhaṃ vā
karesi |yadā pariśrānta upaveṣṭukāmas tadācaukṣaṃ caukṣaṃ vā karoṣi |

lg.l: atimānonmattānām ahite hitam iti kṛtapratijñānām |
naivāsti paraṃ teṣāṃ svacchandakṛtapramāṇānām || 12 ||

p.seg: appamāṇaṃ tuha edaṃ bahuaṃ mantaantassa |apramāṇaṃ tavaitad bahukaṃ mantrayamāṇasya |

lg.head: mā maivam |
lg.l: pramāṇaṃ kuru yal loke pramāṇīkriyate budhaiḥ |
nāpramāṇaṃ pramāṇasthāḥ kariṣyantīti niścayaḥ || 13 ||

p.seg: ṇa khu de pamāṇaṃ jāṇāmi |na khalu te pramāṇaṃ jānāmi |
ṇa dāva ajjhaissaṃ |ta tāvad adhyeṣye |
ajjhaaṇassa dāva atthaṃ soduṃ icchāmi |adhyayanasya tāvad arthaṃ śrotum icchāmi |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
adhītādhyayanair api kālāntaravijñeyā bhavanty adhyayanārthāḥ |
tasmād adhīṣva tāvat |

p.seg: adhīde kiṃ bhavissadi |adhīte kiṃ bhaviṣyati |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
śṛṇu | jñānād bhavati vijñānam | vijñānāt saṃyamaḥ | saṃyamā
t tapaḥ | tapaso yogapravṛttiḥ | yogapravṛtter atītānāgatavartamānatattvadarśanaṃ
bhavati | etebhyo 'ṣṭaguṇam aiśvaryaṃ labhate |

p.seg:
bho bhaavaṃ | appaccakkhe jahākāmaṃ mama buddhiṃ paribhavia
bhaṇāsi | sakkaṃ puṇa adiṭṭhe bhaavādo paragehāṇi pavisiduṃ |bho bhagavan | apratyakṣe yathākāmaṃ mama buddhiṃ paribhūya bhaṇasi | śakyaṃ punar adṛṣṭe bhagavataḥ paragṛhāṇi praveṣṭum |

mama abhippedaṃ sakkiasamaṇaāṇaṃ kāraṇādo susādhidāṇi
saṅghappavuttāṇi bhoaṇāṇi aṇhiduṃ |mamābhipretaṃ śākyaśramaṇakānāṃ kāraṇāt susādhitāni saṅghaprayuktāni/pravṛttāni bhojanāny aśitum |
edassa kāraṇādo tuvaṃ muṇḍido si |etasya kāraṇāt tvaṃ muṇḍito 'si |

lg.head: mā maivam |
lg.l:
mahātmabhiḥ sevitapūjitaṃ dvijaiḥ
surāsurāṇām api buddhisaṃmatam |

avāryam akṣobhyam acintyam avyayaṃ
mahan mayā yogaphalaṃ niṣevyate || 14 ||

p.seg:
bho bhaavaṃ | joo joo tti pavvājaā bahuaṃ mantaanti |
ko eso joo ṇāma |bho bhagavan | yogo yoga iti pravrājakā bahukaṃ mantrayante | ka eṣa yogo nāma |

lg.head: śṛṇu |
lg.l: jñānamūlaṃ tapaḥsāraṃ sattvasthaṃ dvandvanāśanam |
muktaṃ dveṣāc ca rāgāc ca yoga ity abhidhīyate || 15 ||

p.seg:
āhārappamādo savvappamādo tti mantaantassa ṇamo bhaavado
buddhassa |āhārapramādaḥ sarvapramāda iti mantrayamāṇāya namo bhagavate buddhāya |

bhaavaṃ | kiṃ ṇa āṇāsi | puṭhamaṃ evva ahaṃ pādarasaṇaloheṇa
sakkiasamaṇaaṃ pavvajido mhi |bhagavan | kiṃ na jānāsi | prathamam evāhaṃ prātaraśanalobhena śākyaśramaṇakaṃ pravrajito 'smi |
atthi atthi | pabhūdaṃ pi atthi |asti, asti | prabhūtam apy asti |

suṇādu bhaavo | aṣṭau prakṛtayaḥ | ṣoḍaśa vikārāḥ | ātmā |
pañca vāyavaḥ | traiguṇyam | manaḥ | sañcaraḥ | pratisañcaraś ceti | evvaṃ bhaa
vadā jiṇeṇa piḍaaputthaesu uttaṃ |śṛṇotu bhagavān | aṣṭau … ceti | evaṃ bhagavatā jineṇa piṭakapustakeṣūktam |

bubhukkhāe odaṇagadāe cintāe aññaṃ cintidaṃ aññaṃ mantidaṃ |
dāṇiṃ suṇādu bhaavo | pāṇādipādādo veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ | adiṇṇādā
ṇādo veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ | abbamhacayyādo veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ | mudhā
vādādo veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ | viālabhoaṇādo veramaṇī sikkhāpadaṃ |
amhāṇaṃ buddhaṃ dhammaṃ saṅghaṃ saraṇaṃ gacchāmi |bubhukṣayā odanagatayā cintayā anyac cintitaṃ anyan mantritam | idānīṃ śṛṇotu bhagavān | prāṇātipātād viramaṇaṃ śikṣāpadam | adattādānād ... abrahmacaryād … mudhāvādād … vikālabhojanād ... asmākaṃ buddhaṃ dharmaṃ saṅghaṃ śaraṇaṃ gacchāmi |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p: śāṇḍilya | svasamayam atikramya parasamayaṃ vaktuṃ nārhati bhavān |

lg.l: tamas tyaktvā rajo jitvā sattvasthaḥ susamāhitaḥ |
dhyātu śīghraṃ bhavān dhyānam etaj jñānaprayojanam || 16 ||

p.seg:
bhaavo susamāhido joaṃ cintedu | ahaṃ susamāhido odaṇaṃ
cintemi |bhagavān susamāhito yogaṃ cintayatu | ahaṃ susamāhita odanaṃ cintayāmi |

lg.l:
sarvaṃ jagat saṅkṣipa dehabandhe
yathendriyāṇy ātmani yojayitvā |

jñānena sattvaṃ samupāśraya tvaṃ
dehātmanātmānam avekṣya kṛtsnam || 17 ||

p.seg: hañje mahuarie mahuarie | kahiṃ kahiṃ rāmilao |hañje madhukarike madhukarike | kutra kutra rāmilakaḥ |
ajjue | aaṃ āachāmi tti bhaṇia ṇaaraṃ evva paviṭṭho āvutto |ajjuke | aham āgacchāmīti bhaṇitvā nagaram eva praviṣṭa āvuttaḥ |
hañje | kiṃ ṇu khu bhave |hañje | kiṃ nu khalu bhavet |
kiṃ aññaṃ goṭṭhiṃ tuvāreduṃ |kim anyad goṣṭhīṃ tvarayitum |
dāṇiṃ pi ṇa payyattā goṭṭhī |idānīm api na paryāptā goṣṭhī |

suṭṭhu ajjuā bhaṇādi | āsavo evva goṭṭhī jo mattāvedi hassāvedi
lajjādhīraṃ pi itthiājaṇaṃ |suṣṭhv ajjukā bhaṇati | āsava eva goṣṭhī, yo madayati hāsayati lajjādhīram api strījanam |
gaccha | tuvārehi ṇaṃ |gaccha | tvarayainam |
ajjue | taha | niṣkrāntā | ajjuke | tathā |
hañje parahudie parahudie | kahiṃ kahiṃ uvavisāmo |hañje | parabhṛtike, parabhṛtike | kutra kutropaviśāvaḥ |

ajjue | edassiṃ kusumidasahaāratilaamaṇḍide silāpaṭṭae muhuttaaṃ
uvavisia ekkaṃ vatthuaṃ gāadu ajjuā |ajjuke | etasmin kusumitasahakāratilakamaṇḍite śilāpaṭṭake muhūrtam upaviśyaikaṃ vastukaṃ gāyatv ajjukā |
evvaṃ hodu |evaṃ bhavatu |

lg.l: parabhṛtamadhukaranādajyāghoṣaḥ kāma eṣa udyāne |
ti ṣṭa ṣṭha ti sahakāraśaro muhyati nūnaṃ mano 'pi muneḥ || 18 ||

p.seg:
ae | koilaravo | punar vibhāvya | ṇa khu aaṃ
koilaravo | pāase ghidaṃ pakkhittaṃ via aimahuro ko vi gīaravo |
hodu pekkhāmi dāva | vilokya | avihā | kā ṇu khu esā taruṇī dassa
ṇīā aṇavaroheṇa alaṅkāreṇa alaṅkidā imassa uyyāṇassa alaṅkāro
via uvaviṭṭhā |aye | kokilaravaḥ | na khalv ayaṃ kokilaravaḥ | pāyase ghṛtaṃ prakṣiptam ivātimadhuraḥ ko 'pi gītaravaḥ | bhavatu paśyāmi tāvat | avidhā | ko nu khalv eṣā taruṇī darśanīyānavaroheṇālaṃkāreṇālaṃkṛtāsyodyānasyālaṃkāra ivopaviṣṭā |
ajjue |ajjuke |
ai | gaṇiā khu iaṃ | dhaññā khu sadhaṇā |ayi | gaṇikā khalv iyam | dhanyāḥ khalu sadhanāḥ |
dudīaṃ pi ekkaṃ vatthuaṃ gāadu ajjuā |dvitīyam apy ekaṃ vastukaṃ gāyatv ajjukā |
taha | punar gāyati | tathā |

lg.l: madhumāsajātadarpaḥ kandarpaḥ kāminīkaṭākṣasakhaḥ |
api yoginām iha mano vidhyati phullair aśokaśaraiḥ || 19 ||

p.seg: aimahuraṃ passavadi kaṇṭhādo | suṇādu bhaavo |atimadhuraṃ prasravati kaṇṭhāt | śṛṇotu bhagavān |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p: śabdaprayojanaṃ śrotram | prasaṅgam atra na gacchāmi |

p.seg: pasaṅgaṃ pi sampadaṃ karesi jai se kārisāpaṇā bhave |prasaṅgam api sāṃprataṃ karoṣi, yady asya kārṣāpaṇāṃ bhaveyuḥ |
mā kuppa | ajuttaṃ pavvājaāṇaṃ kuppiduṃ |mā kupyaḥ | ayuktaṃ pravrājakāṇāṃ kopitum |
dāṇiṃ paṇḍido si |idānīṃ paṇḍito 'si |

sp.speaker: yamapuruṣaḥ

lg.head: eṣa bhoḥ |
lg.l:
bhūtāni yo harati karmahatāni loke
yaḥ prāṇināṃ sukṛtaduṣkṛtakarmasākṣī |

ukto 'smi tena śamanena yamena dehe
prāṇān prajāvadhividhau viniyojayeti || 20 ||

lg.head: tasmāt |
lg.l:
nānārāṣṭranadīvanācalavatīṃ bhūmiṃ samālokayan
me dhai ghai s toyabharāvanamranicayaiḥ pracchādyamāno bhṛśam |

tīrtvā cāraṇasiddhakinnarayutaṃ vātoddhatābhraṃ nabhaḥ
samprāpto 'smi yamena yatra vihitas tarkād ivāhaṃ puram || 21 ||

sp.p: tat kva nu khalu sā | aye | iyaṃ sā |

lg.l:
sapallavais taptasuvarṇavarṇair
aśokapuṣpastabakair manojñaiḥ |

antarhitā bhāti varāṅganaiṣā
sandhyābhrajālair iva candralekhā || 22 ||

sp.p: bhavatu | asty asyāḥ karmāvaśeṣaḥ | muhūrtaṃ sthitvā prāṇān harāmi |

p.seg: ajjue | dassaṇīo khu eso asoakisalao | ṇaṃ gaṇhāmi |ajjuke | darśanīyaḥ khalv eṣo 'śokakisalayaḥ | enaṃ gṛhṇāmi |
mā mā evvaṃ | ahaṃ evva gaṇhāmi |mā maivam | aham eva gṛhṇāmi |

sp.speaker: yamapuruṣaḥ
sp.p:
ayaṃ sa deśakālaḥ | yāvat sarpatvam upagamyāśokaśākhāyāṃ sthitvā
syāḥ prāṇān harāmi | tathā kurvan | ayam idānīm |

lg.l:
śyāmāṃ prasannavadanāṃ madhurapralāpāṃ
mattāṃ viśālajaghanāṃ varacandanārdrām |

raktotpalābhanayanāṃ nayanābhirāmāṃ
kṣipraṃ nayāmi yamasādanam eva bālām || 23 ||

p.seg: haṃ | keṇa vi daṭṭha mhi |ham | kenāpi daṣṭāsmi |
ammahe | eso so asoakoḍarantarido vālo |ammahe | eṣa so 'śokakoṭarāntarito vyālaḥ |
haṃ | vālo | iti patitā | ham | vyālaḥ |
bhodi | kiṃ edaṃ |bhavati | kim etat |
ayya | esā ajjuā vāleṇa daṭṭhā |ārya | eṣājjukā vyālena daṣṭā |
avihā | bho bhaavaṃ | esā gaṇiā dāriā vāleṇa daṭṭhā |avidhā | bho bhagavan | eṣā gaṇikā dārikā vyālena daṣṭā |

lg.l: svakarma bhoktuṃ jāyante prāyeṇaiva hi jantavaḥ |
kṣīṇe karmaṇi cānyatra punar gacchanti dehinaḥ || 24 ||

p.seg: ajjue | kiṃ bādhedi |ajjuke | kiṃ bādhate |

sīdadi via me sarīraṃ | ubbhamantī via me diṭṭhī | āuliaṃ
via me hiaaṃ | ṇiggacchanti via me pāṇā | saiduṃ icchāmi |sīdatīva me śarīram, udbhramantīva me dṛṣṭiḥ, ākulitam iva me hṛdayam, nirgacchantīva me prāṇāḥ | śayitum icchāmi |
suhaṃ saadu ajjuā |sukhaṃ śetām ajjukā |
attaṃ abhivādehi |mātaram abhivādaya |
mā mā evvaṃ | saaṃ evva attaṃ abhivādehi |mā maivam | svayam eva mātaram abhivādayiṣyasi |
rāmilaaṃ āliṅgehi | iti mūrcchitā | rāmilakam āliṅga |
hā | hadā khu ajjuā |hā | hatā khalu ajjukā |

sp.speaker: yamapuruṣaḥ

lg.l:
gaṅgām uttīrya vindhyaṃ śubhasalilavahāṃ narmadām eṣa sahyaṃ
goleyīṃ kṛṣṇaveṇṇāṃ paśupatibhavanaṃ suprayogāṃ ca kāñcīm |

kāverīṃ tāmraparṇīm atha malayagiriṃ sāgaraṃ laṅghayitvā
vegād uttīrya laṅkāṃ pavanasamagatiḥ prāptavān dharmadeśam || 25 ||

sp.p: ayaṃ viśālaśākho vaṭavṛkṣaḥ | atrāsīnaṃ citraguptaṃ nayāmi | niṣkrāntaḥ |

p.seg: hā ajjue |hā ajjuke |
bhaavaṃ | parittajadi esā gaṇiā dāriā attaṇo pāṇāṇi |bhagavan | parityajaty eṣā gaṇikā dārikātmanaḥ prāṇān |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
mūrkha | paramapriyāḥ prāṇināṃ prāṇāḥ | prāṇais tu parityajyate
śarīram iti vaktavyam |

p.seg:
ā | apehi | aaruṇa ṇissiṇeha kakkasahiaa duṭṭhabuddha
bhiṇṇacāritta kūrasaaḍa muhāmuṇḍa |ā | apehi | akaruṇa niḥsneha karkaśahṛdaya duṣṭabuddha bhinnacāritra kūraśakaṭa mudhāmuṇḍa |
ṇāmaṭṭhasadaṃ de pūraissaṃ |nāmāṣṭaśataṃ te pūrayiṣyāmi |
bho bhaavaṃ | dukkhido mhi |bho bhagavan | duḥkhito 'smi |
amhāṇaṃ saaṇo esā |asmākaṃ svajana eṣā |
esā pavvājiā via ṇa kahiñci siṇehaṃ karedi |eṣā pravrājikā iva na kvacit snehaṃ karoti |

lg.l:
ye nirmamā mokṣam anuprapannāḥ
śāstropadiṣṭena pathā prayānti |

teṣām api prītiparāṅmukhānāṃ
guṇeṣv apekṣāṃ hṛdayaṃ karoti || 26 ||

p.seg: bho bhaavaṃ | ṇa sakkuṇomi attāṇaṃ dhāreduṃ | uvasappia rodāmi |bho bhagavan | na śaknomy ātmānaṃ dhārayitum | upasṛtya rodimi |

mā kuppa | ajuttaṃ pavvājaāṇaṃ kuppiduṃ | upasṛtya | hā ajjue |
hā piasampaṇṇe | hā mahuragāiṇi |mā kupyaḥ | ayuktaṃ pravrājakānāṃ kopitum | hā ajjuke | hā priyasaṃpanne | hā madhuragāyini |
ayya | kiṃ edaṃ |ārya | kim etat |
bhodi | siṇeho |bhavati | snehaḥ |
jujjadi savvāṇukampī sāhujaṇo ṇāma |yujyate sarvānukampī sādhujano nāma |
bhodi | āmissāmi dāva ṇaṃ |bhavati | āmṛśāmi tāvad enām |
pabhavadi ayyo |prabhavaty āryaḥ |
hā bhodi | pādau spṛśati | hā bhavati |
mā mā pādāṇi āmissiduṃ |mā mā pādāv āmṛṣṭum |

ā | āula mhi | sīsaṃ pādaṃ pi ṇa āṇāmi | edāṇi
tālaphalapīṇāṇi kāleacandaṇāṇulittāṇi thaṇāṇi aṇahomuhāṇi tatta
hodīe adhaṇassa mama jīvantīe ṇa āsādidāṇi |ā | ākulito 'smi | śīrṣaṃ pādam api na jānāmi | etau tālaphalapīnau kāleyacandanānuliptau stanāv anadhomukhau tatrabhavatyā adhanasya mama jīvantyā nāsāditau |

evvaṃ dāva karissaṃ | prakāśam | ayya | ajjuaṃ muhuttaaṃ
paḍivālehi | jāva attaṃ āṇemi |evaṃ tāvat kariṣyāmi | ārya | ajjukāṃ muhūrtakaṃ paripālaya, yāvan mātaram ānayāmi |
gaccha sigghaṃ | ahaṃ attā aṇattāṇaṃ |gaccha śīghram | ahaṃ mātāmātṝṇām |

sāṇukkoso eso bamhaṇo ajjuaṃ ṇa pariccaadi | jāva
gacchāmi | niṣkrāntā | sānukrośa eṣa brāhmaṇo 'jjukāṃ na parityajati, yāvat gacchāmi |
gadā esā | seraṃ rodāmi | hā ajjue | hā mahuragāiṇi |gataiṣā | svairaṃ rodimi | hā ajjuke | hā madhuragāyini |
ā | apehi ṇissiṇeha | maṃ pi tumaṃ via takkesi |ā | apehi niḥsneha | mām api tvāṃ tarkayasi |
bhaavaṃ | kiṃ | ciicchīadu dāva esā aṇāhā tavassiṇī |bhagavan | kim | cikitsyatāṃ tāvad eṣā 'nāthā tapasvinī |
aghaṃ de joassa phalaṃ |aghaṃ te yogasya phalam |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
ātmagatam | eṣa khalu tapasvī kartavyābodhyatayāśramāpavādaṃ na
jānāti | kiñcic chrutaṃ maheśvarādibhir yogācāryaiḥ śiṣyānukrośaḥ saṅgaṃ na
bādhata iti | tad asya pratyayotpādanaṃ kariṣyāmīdṛśo yoga iti | asyā
gaṇikāyāḥ śarīra ātmānaṃ yojayāmi | yogenāviṣṭaḥ |

p.seg: avihā | paccāadappāṇā khu esā | bhodi | aa mhi |avidhā | pratyāgataprāṇā khalv eṣā | bhavati | ayam asmi
avihā | adicokkhiṇī khu iaṃ |avidhā | aticaukṣīṇī khalv iyam |

iha vi ajjhaaṇaṃ | bhaavantaṃ evva uvasappāmi | upasṛtya |
bho bhaavaṃ | ai | mudo bhaavo | hā vāālaa | hā adijoavittaa |
hā uvajjhāa | hā | evvaṃ bahu jāṇanto vi maranti |ihāpy adhyayanam | bhagavantam evopasarpāmi | bho bhagavan | ayi | mṛto bhagavān | hā vācālaka | hā atiyogavittaka | hā upādhyāya | hā | evaṃ bahu jānanto 'pi mriyante |
edu edu attā |etv etu mātā |
kahiṃ kahiṃ me dāriā |kutra kutra me dārikā |
esā ajjuā uyyāṇe vāleṇa daṭṭhā |eṣājjukodyāne vyālena daṣṭā |
hā | hada mhi mandabhāā |hā | hatāsmi mandabhāgā |
assasadu assasadu attā | esā ajjuā satthā ciṭṭhadi |āśvasitv āśvasitu mātā | eṣājjukā svasthā tiṣṭhati |
ṇaṃ paiditthā jaha | upagamya | jāde vasantaseṇe | kiṃ edaṃ |nanu prakṛtisthā yathā | putri vasantasene | kim etat |
haddhi | kiṃ edaṃ |hā dhik | kim etat |
accārūḍho se visaveo |atyārūḍo 'syā viṣavegaḥ |
gaccha sigghaṃ | vejjaṃ āṇehi |gaccha śīghram | vaidyam ānaya |
atte | taha | niṣkrāntā | mātaḥ | tathā |

sp.speaker: ceṭī

p.seg: edu edu āvutto | āvuttaṃ apekkhantī santappadi ajjuā |etv etv āvuttaḥ | āvutam apaśyantī saṃtapyaty ajjukā |

lg.l: icchāmi tāvad asyāḥ kalamadhuravaco mukhaṃ viśālākṣyāḥ |
madhupavrato 'bhipātuṃ vikasitam iva komalaṃ kamalam || 27 ||

sp.p: upetya | kathaṃ māṃ dṛṣṭvā parāvṛttamukhī sthitā | vastrānte gṛhṇan |

lg.l:
etan nivartaya sugātri mukhāravindam
īṣattaraṅgaparivṛttam ivāravindam |

prīṇāti nāma tava vaktram asarvadṛṣṭam
alpālpapītam iva pāṇipuṭena toyam || 28 ||

p.seg: jadappahudi vāleṇa daṭṭhā tadappahudi asambaddhāṇi mantedi |yadāprabhṛti vyālena daṣṭā tadāprabhṛty asaṃbaddhāni mantrayate |

lg.head: evam |
lg.l: vyaktam asyā gataṃ cetas tataḥ śūnye tapasvinī |
śarīre 'nyena kenāpi sattvayuktena dharṣitā || 29 ||

p.seg: edu edu ayyo |etv etv āryaḥ |
kahiṃ sā |kutra sā |
esā khu ajjuā satthā ṭhidā |eṣā khalv ajjukā svasthā sthitā |
dharisidā khu mahāsappeṇa khādidā bhave |dharṣitā khalu mahāsarpeṇa khāditā bhavet |
kahaṃ ayyo jāṇādi |katham āryo jānāti |

mahantaṃ viāraṃ karedi tti | † āṇehi | savvārambhāṇi dāva āra
mbhissaṃ visatante † | upaviśya maṇḍalaṃ racayitvā | kuṇḍalakuḍilagāmiṇi |
maṇḍalaṃ pavisa maṇḍalaṃ | vāsuiputta | ciṭṭha ciṭṭha | śū śū | jāva sirāvehaṃ
karissaṃ | kahiṃ kuṭhāriā |mahāntaṃ vikāraṃ karotīti | ānaya sarvārambhān, yāvad ārambhe viṣatantram | kuṇḍalakuṭilagāmini | maṇḍalaṃ praviśa maṇḍalam | vāsukiputra | tiṣṭha tiṣṭha | śū śū | yāvac chirāvedhaṃ kariṣyāṃi | kutra kuṭhārikā |
ai | pittaṃ pi atthi | aaṃ de pittaṃ vādaṃ semhaṃ ca ṇāsemi |ayi | pittam apy asti | ayaṃ te pittaṃ vātaṃ śleṣmāṇaṃ ca nāśayāmi |

sp.speaker: rāmilakaḥ
sp.p: kriyatāṃ yatnaḥ | na khalv akṛtajñā vayam |

p.seg: sundaraguliaṃ vālavejjaṃ āṇemi | niṣkrāntaḥ | sundaragulikaṃ vyālavaidyam ānayāmi |

sp.speaker: yamapuruṣaḥ

lg.l: na sā vasantaseneyaṃ kṣipraṃ tatraiva nīyatām |
anyā vasantasenā sā kṣīṇāyus tām ihānaya || 30 ||

sp.p:
iti | yāvad asyāḥ śarīram agnisaṃyogaṃ nopanīyate tāvat saprāṇām enāṃ karomi
| vilokya | aye | utthitā khalv iyam | bhoḥ | kiṃ nu khalv idam |

lg.l: asyā jīvo mama kara utthitaiṣā varāṅganā |
āścaryaṃ paramaṃ loke bhuvi pūrvaṃ na dṛśyate || 31 ||

sp.p:
sarvato vilokya | aye | atrabhavān yogī parivrājakaḥ krīḍati | kim idānīṃ
kariṣye | bhavatu dṛṣṭam | asyā gaṇikāyā ātmānaṃ parivrājakaśarīre
nyasyāvasite karmaṇi yathāsthānaṃ yojayiṣyāmi | tathā kṛtvā |

lg.l: ete vipraśarīre 'smin strīprāṇā viniyojitāḥ |
yathāsattvaṃ yathāśīlaṃ prāyo yāsyanti vikriyām || 32 ||

p.seg: parahudie parahudie |parabhṛtike parabhṛtike |

avihā | paccāadappāṇo khu bhaavo | ā | takkemi dukkha
bhāiṇo ṇa maranti tti |avidhā | pratyāgataprāṇaḥ khalu bhagavān | ā | tarkayāmi duḥkhabhāgino na mriyanta iti |
kahiṃ kahiṃ rāmilao |kutra kutra rāmilakaḥ |

bhaavaṃ | kiṃ edaṃ | kuṇḍiaggahaṇoidaṃ vāmahatthaṃ saṅkhavalaa
pūridaṃ via me paḍibhādi |bhagavan | kim etat | kuṇḍikāgrahaṇocito vāmahastaḥ śaṅkhavalayapūrita iva me pratibhāti |
rāmilaa | āliṅgehi maṃ |rāmilaka | āliṅga mām |
kiṃsuaṃ āliṅgehi |kiṃśukam āliṅga |
rāmilaa | mattā khu ahaṃ |rāmilaka | mattā khalv aham |
ṇahi ṇahi | ummatto khu tuvaṃ |nahi nahi | unmattaḥ khalu tvam |
suraṃ pibāmi |surāṃ pibāmi |

visaṃ piba | bhodu | parihāsappamāṇaṃ jāṇissaṃ | ṇeva bhaavo
ṇeva ajjuā | bhaavadajjuaṃ ṇāma saṃvuttaṃ |viṣaṃ piba | bhavatu, parihāsapramāṇaṃ jñāsyāmi | naiva bhagavān, naivājjukā | bhagavadajjukaṃ nāma saṃvṛttam |
parahudie parahudie | āliṅgehi maṃ |parabhṛtike parabhṛtike | āliṅga mām |
apehi |apehi |
jāde vasantaseṇe |putri vasantasene |
ia mhi | atte | vandāmi |iyam asmi | mātaḥ | vande |
bhaavaṃ | kiṃ edaṃ |bhagavan | kim etat |
atte | paccabhijāṇāsi maṃ | rāmilaa | ajja cirāidaṃ khu tue |mātaḥ | pratyabhijānāsi mām | rāmilaka | ādya cirāyitaṃ khalu tvayā |

guliā mae aṭṭha gahidā | osahaṃ ca | khaṇe khaṇe jīvi
ssadi marissadi tti | upagamya | udaaṃ udaaṃ |gulikā mayā aṣṭau gṛhītāḥ | auṣadhaṃ ca | kṣaṇe kṣaṇe jīviṣyati mariṣyatīti | udakam udakam |
idaṃ udaaṃ |idam udakam |
guliaṃ oghaṭṭhaāmi | avihā | ṇa hu iaṃ daṭṭhā | āviṭṭhā khu iaṃ |gulikām avaghaṭṭayāmi | avidhā | na khalv iyaṃ daṣṭā | āviṣṭā khalv iyam |

sp.speaker: gaṇikā
sp.p:
mūrkhavaidya vṛthāvṛddha | prāṇinām antakam api na jānīṣe | katameneyaṃ
sarpeṇa vyāpāditeti vada |

p.seg: kiṃ ettha acchariaṃ |kim atrāścaryam |
satthasahassaṃ atthi |śāstrasahasram asti |
suṇādu bhodī |śṛṇotu bhavatī |

lg.l: vātikāḥ paittikāś caiva ślai— ślai—...

p.seg: avihā | putthaaṃ putthaaṃ |avidhā | pustakaṃ pustakam |

aho vejjassa abhirūvadā | ekkapade vīsarido | hodu | mama
vaasso evva | idaṃ putthaaṃ |aho | vaidyasyābhirūpatā | ekapade vismṛtaḥ | bhavatu, mama vayasyaivedaṃ pustakam |
suṇādu bhodī |śṛṇotu bhavatī |

lg.l: vātikāḥ paittikāś caiva ślaiṣmikāś ca mahāviṣāḥ |
trīṇi sarpā bhavanty ete caturtho nādhigamyate || 33 ||

sp.speaker: gaṇikā
sp.p:
ayam apaśabdaḥ | trayaḥ sarpā iti vaktavyam | trīṇīti napuṃsakaṃ
bhavati |

p.seg: avihā | vaiāaraṇasappeṇa khādidā bhave |avidhā | vaiyākaraṇasarpeṇa khāditā bhavet |
visaveā sadaṃ |viṣavegāś śatam |

sp.speaker: gaṇikā
sp.p: na na | sapta viṣavegāḥ | tad yathā |

lg.l: romāñco mukhaśoṣaś ca vaivarṇyaṃ caiva vepathuḥ |
hikkā śvāsaś ca sammohaḥ saptaite viṣavikriyāḥ || 34 ||

sp.p:
saptaviṣavegād atikrānto 'śvibhyām api na śakyate cikitsitum | athavā
vaktavyam asti ced brūhi |

p.seg:
ṇa hu amhāṇaṃ visao | ṇamo bhodīe | gacchāmi dāva ahaṃ |
niṣkrāntaḥ | na khalv asmākaṃ viṣayaḥ | namo bhavatyai | gacchāmi tāvad aham |

sp.speaker: yamapuruṣaḥ

lg.head: ((praviśya)) bhoḥ |
lg.l:
garbhasravaiś ca piṭakajvarakarṇarogair
gulmādhiśūlahṛdayākṣiśirorugādyaiḥ |

asmin kṣaṇe bahuvidhaiḥ khalu vidravaiś ca
kṣipraṃ kṛtā yamapurābhimukhāś ca jīvāḥ || 35 ||

sp.p:
yāvad aham api bhagavatsandeśam anutiṣṭhāmi | gaṇikām upetya | bhagavan | mucyatāṃ
vṛṣalyāḥ śarīram |

sp.speaker: yamapuruṣaḥ
sp.p:
yathāsvaṃ jīvavinimayaṃ kṛtvā svakāryam anutiṣṭhāmi | ((tathā kṛtvā
niṣkrāntaḥ |))

p.seg: eso bhaavo sabhāve payyavatthido |eṣa bhagavān svabhāve paryavasthitaḥ |
parahudie parahudie |parabhṛtike parabhṛtike |
esā ajjuā sabhāveṇa mantedi |eṣājjukā svabhāvena mantrayate |
jādo vasantaseṇe |putri vasantasene |

p.stage: niṣkrāntā gaṇikā mātā rāmilakaś ceṭyau ca |

p.seg: bhaavaṃ | kiṃ edaṃ |bhagavan, kim etat |

sp.speaker: parivrājakaḥ
sp.p:
mahatī khalu kathā | āvāse kathayiṣyāmi | diśo vilokya |
gato divasaḥ | samprati hi

lg.l:
astaṃ gato hi dinakṛdgaganāntalambī
mūṣāmukhastha iva taptasuvarṇarāśiḥ |

yasya prabhābhir anurañjitameghavṛndam
ālakṣyate dahanagarbham ivāntarikṣam || 36 ||
